name: @platform/access-control
description: Generic access-control package for admin, staff, user, service, and support role models and permission policy.

readme.summary: DEPRECATED (ADR-0006 / ADR-ACT-0288): superseded by apps/platform-api authorisation-runtime + adapters-keycloak (server-side authz); do not add new usage; removal review 2026-12-18. Generic access-control package for admin, staff, user, service, and support role models and permission policy.
responsibilities: Own generic role and permission model definitions
Define admin, staff, user, service, and support role policy primitives
Expose pure TypeScript APIs for permission checks and role-aware capability decisions
nonResponsibilities: Does not persist role assignments directly
Does not render role-specific React screens
usage: Do not add new consumers — this package is deprecated (ADR-0006), retained only until its removal review 2026-12-18.
operationalNotes: Role examples are generic enterprise roles and not product-specific personas
